---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue in the matrix
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. What exactly broke?

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. Did you expect a terminal shell to pop up? Did you expect the agents to write your CV flawlessly?

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. Visuals help us debug faster.

## Environment:
* OS: [e.g. iOS, Windows, Linux]
* Browser: [e.g. chrome, safari]
* Version: [e.g. 22]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here. Stack traces, console logs, or anything else you pulled from the mainframe.
